# checkpointsase_standard_networks (Data Source)

List all standard networks in Check Point SASE. Uses the /v2.3/networks/standard endpoint.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "checkpointsase_standard_networks" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `networks` (List of Object) The list of standard networks. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--networks))

<a id="nestedatt--networks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `networks`

Read-Only:

- `access_type` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `dns` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `subnet` (String)
- `tags` (List of String)
- `tenant_id` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
